title: brain maintain [--apply] — --json success output
description: Vault maintenance: turns orphans, broken links, and stale content into proposals. Non-mutating PREVIEW by default (no sinks, no audit-ref event); --apply runs tiered integration per workflow-risk-contract.md. Destructive proposals are ALWAYS Tier-3 (review-pending, exit 6). --dry-run + --apply ⇒ exit 5. --yes never authorizes. Thresholds per acceptance-thresholds.md §workflow.

allOf.description: A Tier-2 auto-integrated result MUST carry BOTH independently-typed confidence inputs (acceptance-thresholds.md §workflow): a Tier-2 applied outcome cannot validate with either input absent — the min-reduction is fail-closed.

modelConfidence.description: The generation model's self-reported confidence (acceptance-thresholds.md §workflow modelConfidence); independently gated at >= 0.8.

validationConfidence.description: The deterministic validator's confidence (acceptance-thresholds.md §workflow validationConfidence); independently gated at >= 0.8. Tier-2 requires min(modelConfidence, validationConfidence) >= 0.8.

findings.description: Maintenance findings and their proposed remediation.

destructive.description: true ⇒ the remediation removes content ⇒ forced Tier-3.

x-atlas-contract.summary: Maintain the vault (orphans/broken-links/stale ⇒ proposals): non-mutating preview by default; destructive proposals always Tier-3 (review-pending, exit 6).

flags.description: Perform the mutation (tiered integration); without it, emit a non-mutating preview.
Caller-supplied idempotency key; a repeat --apply with the same key + request-hash (requestHashScope) returns the existing run rather than starting a duplicate (registry idempotency: key-accepting).

sideEffects: apply non-destructive Tier-1/2: broker CAS integrate + finalizeLedgerWrite (run.integrated)
apply destructive/Tier-3: durable plan/branch/worktree/commit, stops at review-pending (run.planned)

errorCodes.when: the vault repo is missing or unreadable
the fail-closed backup watermark blocks a ledger-writing run
an egress/persisted artifact fails the fail-closed secret scan
the run is Tier-3 (incl. every destructive proposal) and stops at the review gate (success-shaped)
